mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.tenant_id, t0.project_id, t0.related_bus_no, t0.business_type, t0.product_name, t0.rist_type_after_guarantee, t0.divided_insurance_debtor, t0.divided_insurance_security, t0.divided_insurance_again_security, t0.divided_insurance_other, t0.risk_compensation, t0.aid, t0.aname, t0.acode, t0.bid, t0.bcode, t0.bname, t0.type,
